return h(J)end,function(E,p)local h=Q(p)local z=function(z,w)return u(E,{z;w},p,h)end return z end,function(E,p)local h=Q(p)local z=function(z,w,q,Y,J,e,V,v,g)return u(E,{z,w,q;Y;J;e;V,v,g},p,h)end
